items.title: How It Was Shot: The Triangle Shadow of Mount Hood
items.summary: Towering 11,249 feet above sea level, Mount Hood is the tallest mountain in the state of Oregon. The mountain is so large that on a clear day, it can be visible from over 100 miles away. [Read More]
